19.kj: air, anger, blast, breath, [idiom] cool, courage, mind, [idiom] quarter, [idiom] side, spirit(-ual), tempest, [idiom] vain, (whirl-) wind(-y).

19.gl: properly, the nearest part, i.e. the center, whether literal, figurative or adverbial (especially with preposition)
19.kj: [idiom] among, [idiom] before, bowels, [idiom] unto charge, [phrase] eat (up), [idiom] heart, [idiom] him, [idiom] in, inward ([idiom] -ly, part, -s, thought), midst, [phrase] out

19.gl: properly, to flow as water (i.e. to rain); transitively, to lay or throw (especially an arrow, i.e. to shoot); figuratively, to point out (as if by aiming the finger), to teach
19.kj: ([phrase]) archer, cast, direct, inform, instruct, lay, shew, shoot, teach(-er,-ing), through.
19.dv: or (2 Chronicles 26:15) יָרָא; a primitive root;

19.gl: a non-entity; generally used as a negative particle
19.kj: else, except, fail, (father-) less, be gone, in(-curable), neither, never, no (where), none, nor, (any, thing), not, nothing, to nought, past, un(-searchable), well-nigh, without.
19.dv: as if from a primitive root meaning to be nothing or not exist;

19.gl: to manipulate, i.e. seize; chiefly to capture, wield, specifically, to overlay; figuratively, to use unwarrantably
19.kj: catch, handle, (lay, take) hold (on, over), stop, [idiom] surely, surprise, take.

20.gl: the face (as the part that turns); used in a great variety of applications (literally and figuratively); also (with prepositional prefix) as a preposition (before, etc.)
20.kj: [phrase] accept, a-(be-) fore(-time), against, anger, [idiom] as (long as), at, [phrase] battle, [phrase] because (of), [phrase] beseech, countenance, edge, [phrase] employ, endure
20.dv: plural (but always as singular) of an unused noun פָּנֶה; from H6437 (פָּנָה));

20.gl: a sacred place or thing; rarely abstract, sanctity
20.kj: consecrated (thing), dedicated (thing), hallowed (thing), holiness, ([idiom] most) holy ([idiom] day, portion, thing), saint, sanctuary.

20.gl: the earth (at large, or partitively a land)
20.kj: [idiom] common, country, earth, field, ground, land, [idiom] natins, way, [phrase] wilderness, world.
20.dv: from an unused root probably meaning to be firm;

20.gl: Jehovah, Jewish national name of God
20.kj: Jehovah, the Lord. Compare H3050 (יָהּ), H3069 (יְהֹוִה).

20.gl: a large public building, such as a palace or temple
20.dv: probably from H3201 (יָכֹל) (in the sense of capacity);

20.kj: hold peace (tongue), (keep) silence, be silent, still.
